login.title: Welcome to ranzaKord
login.subtitle: Sign in to access your music

sessionExpired: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.

callback.error: Sign in failed. Please try again.
callback.successMessage: You have successfully signed in. You can now close this window and return to the application.
callback.openAppManually: Click here if the app didn't open automatically

unauthorized.title: Access Denied
unauthorized.message: Sorry, you can't access this application.
unauthorized.opensource: However, ranzaKord is completely open-source! You can clone the repository, run it locally, and modify it without any limitations.
